no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/runs.spec.ts -g "runs page virtualizes after 1000 rows and keeps live worker phases updating|node runs page uses shared chips, virtualizes after 1000 rows, and keeps live worker phases updating"

Current tree already satisfies the bead contract:
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/+page.svelte:11-19` imports the shared `FilterChip` primitive and defines the 1k virtualization threshold.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/+page.svelte:157-180` enables `content-visibility` row virtualization and keeps live worker progress subscriptions wired to visible run IDs.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/+page.svelte:317-399` renders the shared chips and exposes `data-virtualized` for the list.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts:596-728` and `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts:731-869` verify both runs surfaces virtualize past 1000 rows and keep live worker phases updating through the virtualized list.

No source changes were required for this bead.
